hooks.command:
bash -c 'COMMAND=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r .command 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qE "git commit.*-m.*"O[0-9]+:"; then OPT=$(echo "$COMMAND" | grep -oE "O[0-9]+" | head -1); echo "
[HOOK] Optimization $OPT committed. Test should run next.
   Run: python3 scripts/run-test-suite.py --prepare --label $OPT
   Then Claude launches 20 parallel agents.
   Then: python3 scripts/run-test-suite.py --consolidate --label $OPT
   Then: python3 scripts/run-test-suite.py --compare --from <previous> --to $OPT"; fi'

_documentation.purpose: WikiForge v2 hook-driven pipeline + optimization test workflow notification

wiki_hooks.on-file-write.sh: raw/{lang}/ writes → queue pending-atoms.txt; wiki/{lang}/ writes → auto-link + qa + optional auto_propagate (re-atomize at locator into other enabled langs)
wiki_hooks.on-session-stop.sh: session end → incremental vault-agent.py audit if files changed
wiki_hooks.on-session-start.sh: session start → notify if pending-atoms queue is non-empty
